title: Rya tegelbruk - Brick kiln in Helsingborg municipality 01
description: A brick kiln from 1911 in Rya in Helsingborg municipality in Sweden. It is the only remaining construction after the Rya Brick Factory (1864-1920). August 3, 2017.
author: Sinikka Halme
attribution_md:
Rya tegelbruk - Brick kiln in Helsingborg municipality 01
A brick kiln from 1911 in Rya in Helsingborg municipality in Sweden. It is the only remaining construction after the Rya Brick Factory (1864-1920). August 3, 2017.

Image: Sinikka Halme ([source](https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Rya_tegelbruk_-_Brick_kiln_in_Helsingborg_municipality_01.jpg))
